Home/Team Messenger VX Deck

Team Messenger VX Deck

$119.00 Sale • Save

creature

Free shipping on orders over $99 in Canada

Item is in stockHurry! Low inventoryItem is out of stock Item is unavailable
Size
 
 

Heel to the Battle Flags of the new 'Messenger' Pro Series featuring our battle-tested VX Eternal Destruction construction and 2 color hand stained veneer. Ride to war with Gravette's trusty 8.3", Worthington's go-to 8.6", and now offered for the first time on Creature VX, the almighty 9.25" Team Egg shape with a 14" wheelbase. Victory over the living awaits - art by Paul Parker.

Team Messenger VX - 9.25" x 31.95" - 14" WB (Egg shape)

VX decks are thinner, stronger, and have more pop than standard 7 ply decks featuring 5 plies of North American Maple and 2 layers of Quad X technology.

ATV is a universal medium-depth concave with symmetrical nose and tail kick that performs well in all terrains on a wide variety of shapes - for anybody, anywhere.
